includeTraitMeta.description: When true, returns envelope with trait metadata

info.description:
Comprehensive API documentation for The New Fuse platform - a multi-agent orchestration system with blockchain integration, workflow automation, and AI-powered capabilities.

## Features
- **Agent Management**: Create, manage, and orchestrate AI agents
- **Workflow Engine**: Build and execute complex workflows
- **Chat System**: Real-time messaging and communication
- **Web3 Integration**: Wallet management, transactions, and smart accounts (ERC-4337)
- **MCP Protocol**: Model Context Protocol for agent communication
- **Authentication**: JWT-based secure authentication
- **Rate Limiting**: Tiered rate limiting based on user roles

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT authentication. Include the Bearer token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-jwt-token>
```

## Base URLs
- Development: `http://localhost:3001/api`
- API Gateway: `http://localhost:4000/api/v1`
- Production: `https://api.thenewfuse.com/api`
info.title: The New Fuse API

post.description: Authenticate user and generate JWT tokens

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description:
Returns a legacy resource array by default.
When `includeTraitMeta=true`, returns an envelope with `{ items, traitScreen }`.
post.summary: Search resources with optional trait screening

post.description:
Accepts either:
- `RESOURCE.SEARCH.REQUEST` protocol envelope, or
- plain `ResourceSearchRequest` filter object.

Always returns a `RESOURCE.SEARCH.RESPONSE` envelope.
